name: @codexthemes/skills
description: Official agent skills for creating and validating Codex desktop themes.

scripts.validate: tsx skills/codex-theme-creator/scripts/validate-skill.ts skills/codex-theme-creator && tsx skills/codex-theme-creator/scripts/validate-skill.ts skills/codex-theme-submitter && tsx skills/codex-theme-creator/scripts/validate-skill.ts skills/codex-theme-finder && tsx skills/codex-theme-creator/scripts/validate-skill.ts skills/codex-theme-installer && tsx skills/codex-theme-creator/scripts/validate-skill.ts skills/codex-theme-switcher && tsx skills/codex-theme-creator/scripts/validate-skill.ts skills/workbuddy-theme-manager
scripts.test: tsx skills/codex-theme-creator/scripts/self-test.ts && tsx skills/codex-theme-submitter/scripts/self-test.ts && tsx skills/codex-theme-finder/scripts/self-test.ts && tsx skills/codex-theme-installer/scripts/self-test.ts && tsx skills/codex-theme-switcher/scripts/self-test.ts && node skills/workbuddy-theme-manager/scripts/self-test.mjs
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run validate && npm test
